body.title: Fix pre-existing test failure: test_main_py_labels_non_procedural looks for missing file
body.result: Fixed stale path: parent.parent → parent.parent.parent to reach repo root
body.intention: I intend that all tests in the suite pass without manually deselecting pre-existing failures.
body.description:
tests/igor/test_coherence_inhibitor_llm_gate.py::TestLlmViaLabel::test_main_py_labels_non_procedural_as_llm_via fails with FileNotFoundError: '/home/akien/dev/src/UnseenUniversity/tests/devices/igor/main.py'. The test looks for a file at a path that doesn't exist — likely a stale path from pre-migration layout.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_coherence_inhibitor_llm_gate.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: fix the file path reference or update the test to match current layout. OUT: changing test logic.
**Completion criteria:** pytest tests/igor/test_coherence_inhibitor_llm_gate.py passes without --deselect.
